options.name: -depth
options.description: Only include hierarchical instance with a number of level <= the argument.

options.name: -detail
options.description: Report break down of cell type (buffer, inverter, combinational, flop, latch, clock_gate, macro, physical)

options.name: -hierarchical_instance
options.description: Reports the area of the leaf instances in the specified hierarchical instance. User can use -depth option to control the analysis depth of specified hierarchical instance. ((hInst), optional)

options.name: -include_physical
options.description: Include physical cells in the area calculation and report

options.name: -min_area
options.description: Min area threshold for module to be reported

options.name: -min_count
options.description: Specify the minimum instance count per hierarchical instance to be considered.

options.name: -show_leaf_cells
options.description: Show the leaf cells that exist at the design level and each hinst level.

options.name: -show_msv_cells
options.description: Include multiple supply voltage cells in the the report; only supported with "-table_by vertical"

options.name: -summary
options.description: It will print the area summary for the design. It will be equivalent as doing "-depth 0"
